title: MY STORY
text:
I discovered my passion for web development later in life, after exploring various paths.

The first time I experimented with HTML, I knew I had found my lifelong pursuit. Since then, I've been dedicated to improving my skills, expanding my knowledge and growing both as a developer and as a person.

Being self-taught, I am deeply grateful to everyone who has contributed to my journey through online courses, blog posts or guidance as a colleague or friend.

My goal is to make meaningful impact, both on users by creating great experiences and on colleagues by making their work easier with my contributions.
